channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Meta Platforms plans massive stock sale to fund $145B AI investments
item.description: Meta's AI investment strategy may reshape tech funding norms, impacting shareholder value and accelerating AI-driven market transformations. The post Meta Platforms plans massive stock sale to fund $145B AI investments appeared first on Crypto Briefing. [Meta]
